content.explanation:
**Prepositions Part 1 — in, on, at, by, for, since:**

Prepositions वो words हैं जो किसी noun/pronoun का relation दूसरे word से बताते हैं।

**IN — अंदर / के अंदर:**
• Place: in the box, in the room, in India
• Time: in January, in 2024, in the morning

**ON — ऊपर (surface) / पर:**
• Place: on the table, on the wall, on the bus
• Time: on Monday, on 15 August, on my birthday

**AT — किसी specific point पर:**
• Place: at the station, at home, at school
• Time: at 5 o'clock, at noon, at night

**BY — के द्वारा / तक:**
• Agent: written by Premchand
• Deadline: finish by Friday, ready by 6 PM

**FOR — के लिए / कितने समय से:**
• Purpose: this gift is for you
• Duration: I waited for 2 hours

**SINCE — से (starting point):**
• Time start: I have lived here since 2015
• Always with Perfect tense
rules: IN = enclosed spaces, months, years, countries, morning/evening/night
ON = surfaces, specific days (on Monday), dates (on 5 March)
AT = specific points/locations (at home, at 5 PM, at the corner)
BY = deadline (by Friday), means of transport (by bus), agent in passive
FOR = duration of time (for 2 hours), purpose (for you)
SINCE = starting point in time (since 2020) — used with Perfect tenses
Common errors: "in school" vs "at school" — at school = वहाँ पढ़ रहे हैं
content.memoryTrick:
**PIE Rule:**
• **P**oint = AT (at 5 PM, at home)
• **I**nside = IN (in the room, in January)
• **E**xtended Surface = ON (on the table, on Monday)
For = कितने समय; Since = कब से

examples.english: The book is in the bag.
The phone is on the table.

examples.hindi: मैं 2 घंटे से wait कर रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I have been waiting for 2 hours.

examples.hindi: मैं 2010 से यहाँ रह रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I have been living here since 2010.

mistakes.correct: I will go home. / I am at home.
mistakes.why: 'Home' के साथ no preposition when going there; use 'at home' for location

mistakes.correct: She is in bed. / She is on the bed.
mistakes.why: 'In bed' = सो रही है; 'on the bed' = बैठी है
Days of week = 'on' (on Monday, on Friday)

speakingTips: अपने घर को describe करो using prepositions: 'My house is at... In the house there is a... On the wall there is...'
Time का use करो: 'I wake up at 6, in the morning I exercise, on Sundays I relax.'
Office emails: 'Please submit the report by 5 PM on Friday.'

vocabulary.example: The keys are beneath the pillow.
The ATM is adjacent to the bank.
Regarding your query, here is the answer.
She is popular among her colleagues.
The park is opposite the school.
Success is beyond hard work alone.

practice.english: I live in Delhi.
alternatives: i stay in delhi.

practice.english: She is in the room.
alternatives: she is inside the room.

practice.english: The book is in the bag.
alternatives: the book is inside the bag.

practice.hindi: वह सुबह में व्यायाम करता है।
practice.english: He exercises in the morning.
alternatives: he works out in the morning.

practice.english: I was born in 2005.
alternatives: i was born in the year 2005.

practice.english: She will return in January.
alternatives: she will come back in january.

practice.english: The book is on the table.
alternatives: the book is on top of the table.

practice.hindi: वह सोमवार को काम करता है।
practice.english: He works on Monday.
alternatives: he goes to work on monday.

practice.english: My birthday is on 15th August.
alternatives: my birthday falls on august 15.

practice.english: She is sitting on the floor.
alternatives: she is seated on the floor.

practice.english: Your name is on the list.
alternatives: your name is listed.

practice.english: He comes to the office at 8 o'clock.
alternatives: he arrives at office at 8.

practice.english: I am at home.
alternatives: i am home.

practice.english: She is standing at the station.
alternatives: she is at the train station.

practice.hindi: रात में वह देर से सोती है।
practice.english: She sleeps late at night.
alternatives: she goes to bed late at night.

practice.hindi: मैं हर रोज़ स्कूल जाता हूँ।
practice.english: I go to school every day.
alternatives: i attend school daily.

practice.hindi: कृपया मुझे स्टेशन तक छोड़ दो।
practice.english: Please drop me to the station.
alternatives: please take me to the station.

practice.english: I went from Delhi to Mumbai.
alternatives: i traveled from delhi to mumbai.

practice.hindi: मैं दो घंटे से पढ़ रहा हूँ।
practice.english: I have been studying for two hours.
alternatives: i have been reading for 2 hours.

practice.english: This gift is for you.
alternatives: this present is for you.

practice.hindi: मैं इस काम के लिए बिल्कुल तैयार हूँ।
practice.english: I am completely ready for this work.
alternatives: i am fully prepared for this job.

practice.hindi: यह मेरी किताब का एक पन्ना है।
practice.english: This is a page of my book.
alternatives: this is one page of my book.

practice.english: He is the captain of the team.
alternatives: he is the team captain.

practice.hindi: मुझे उस पर बहुत गर्व है।
practice.english: I am very proud of him.
alternatives: i feel very proud of him.

practice.english: She will go to Delhi by train.
alternatives: she will travel to delhi by train.

practice.hindi: यह पेंटिंग पिकासो ने बनाई थी।
practice.english: This painting was made by Picasso.
alternatives: this painting was created by picasso.

practice.english: Submit the report by evening.
alternatives: hand in the report by evening.

practice.hindi: वह नदी के किनारे बैठी थी।
practice.english: She was sitting by the river.
alternatives: she sat beside the river.

practice.hindi: वह सुबह 8 बजे स्कूल में आती है।
practice.english: She comes to school at 8 AM in the morning.
alternatives: she arrives at school at 8 in the morning.

practice.hindi: हम रविवार को पार्क में जाते हैं।
practice.english: We go to the park on Sunday.
alternatives: we visit the park on sundays.

practice.hindi: यह किताब बच्चों के लिए लिखी गई है।
practice.english: This book has been written for children.
alternatives: this book was written for kids.

practice.hindi: वह मई के महीने में भारत आएगा।
practice.english: He will come to India in the month of May.
alternatives: he will arrive in india in may.

practice.english: Sit beside me.
alternatives: sit next to me.
sit by me.

practice.hindi: वह सात बजे तक घर पहुँच जाएगी।
practice.english: She will reach home by seven o'clock.
alternatives: she will be home by 7.

practice.hindi: यह ऑफिस शहर के बीचो-बीच है।
practice.english: This office is in the centre of the city.
alternatives: this office is in the heart of the city.
